# API Case Fixtures

`d764dfd9-777a-43e6-956e-8fbcb467db6f-v8.json` stores 100 reusable API verification cases for the preset life net premium formula.

Regenerate and verify:

```bash
cd backend
go run ./cmd/formula_case_runner -generate
```

Reuse existing cases and only verify:

```bash
cd backend
go run ./cmd/formula_case_runner
```
